title: 9pcs Heart Decoration 1.5m Pre-assembled Hanging Heart Garland Valentines Day Decorations Romantic Heart Decoration for Wedding Engagement Party Valentines Day Christmas Mothers Day
features: ❤️‍🔥Heart Decorations Hanging: You will receive 9pcs of pre-assembled 1.5m red heart garlands which are suitable for Valentine’s Day, wedding ceremony, engagement, anniversary, Christmas, New year and other romantic events
❤️‍🔥Premium Material: Made of high-quality PET material, the heart decoration is lightweight, colourful and not easy to tear, bringing your long-lasting happiness and joy
❤️‍🔥Glittering Hearts: The larger hearts on the strings are made of glittering PET material, which makes the heart decoration shiny and eye-catching

❤️‍🔥Pre-assembled Garlands: The hanging heart decorations are pre-assembled and can be hung up right after you take it out of the package. Please try to take the heart decorations out slowly in order not to tangle them up

❤️‍🔥Wide Application: These red heart garlands are nice valentines day decorations, wedding decorations, engagement party decorations, valentine’s decorations, ruby wedding anniversary decorations and Christmas decorations, adding warmth to your important events.·
description: Product description Product Detail: 1. Package Content: 9pcs of 1.5m red heart garlands; 2. Material: PET; 3. Size: Each heart string measures 1.5m and the hearts on it have 3 different sizes (8cm, 6cm, 4cm) Features: 1. The largest hearts on the strings are made of glittering PET material, which makes the heart decoration shiny and eye-catching; 2. The hanging heart decorations are pre-assembled and can be hung up right after you take it out of the package Wide Application: These red heart garlands are nice decoration for wedding, engagement party, valentines, ruby wedding anniversary or Christmas, adding warmth to your important events Tips: Please take the heart decorations out slowly in order not to tangle them up Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not use near heat sources. Do not expose to direct sunlight. Do not use if damaged.
